education.degree_name: Bachelor of Engineering (BE) in Computer Science
education.description:
•	Relevant Coursework: Data Structures & Algorithms, Database Management Systems (MySQL), Web Technologies, Operating Systems, and Cloud Computing.
•	Credential Status: Degree and transcripts ready for UAE Ministry of Education (MoE) equivalency and MOFA attestation.

experience.description:
Systems Architecture & Enterprise Integration
•	Strategic Technical Leadership: Lead the modernization and lifecycle management of the company’s enterprise B2B/B2C ecosystem, managing high-complexity system architectures and ensuring cross-platform stability.
•	Infrastructure & DevOps: Architected a containerized environment using Docker and Ansible for automated server provisioning, utilizing Sentry and GitLab CI/CD to maintain enterprise-level observability.
•	Identity & Security: Directed the implementation of centralized authentication and Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) via Keycloak, securing transactions across vendor POS terminals and admin consoles.
•	Stakeholder Management: Collaborated with external vendors and department heads to translate business requirements into scalable API specifications and technical roadmaps.
Python Backend & Automation (Primary Focus)
•	Noon-to-Dafater Data Engine: Engineered a specialized Python/Flask micro-application to automate high-volume sales data synchronization, featuring custom CSV parsing and validation logic to ensure 100% data integrity.
•	Integration Middleware: Developed robust Python-based middleware to bridge the gap between third-party marketplace APIs and internal ERP systems, eliminating manual data entry and preventing transaction duplication.

Core Systems & Microservices Architecture
•	Scalable Backend Design: Engineered a high-availability Service-Oriented Architecture (SOA) for a social media platform using PHP and MySQL, developing isolated microservices for engagement (likes/comments), user relationships (Follow/Unfollow), and content streaming.
•	Real-Time Communications: Developed a low-latency chat application supporting group and personal messaging, leveraging gRPC (logic design) and MySQL for robust message persistence and real-time status indicators.
•	Feed Engineering: Built a "Lazy Loading" content streaming service and personalized "Following" feeds to optimize data fetching and ensure smooth infinite scrolling for high-traffic environments.
AI & Automation Integration
•	AI-Driven Platforms: Integrated OpenAI API to build "Knobly Research" and "Report Article Generator," enabling automated content synthesis, memo drafting, and intelligent research summarization.
•	Automated Content Pipelines: Developed backend pipelines in PHP to handle high-volume AI requests, ensuring minimal latency in generating contextually relevant reports and social media metadata.
Media & Specialized Python Services
•	Regional OTT Platform (SmileOTT): Built a global movie streaming backend using Python, FFmpeg, and RTMP, optimizing video encoding and DASH formats for global content delivery.
•	Computer Vision Tools: Developed a Python-based automated image processing tool using OpenCV for Kannada Sahitya Parishad, enabling high-precision batch face detection and cropping.
Infrastructure & Third-Party Integrations
•	Financial Systems: Integrated Razorpay for secure subscription and payment handling across multiple client platforms, ensuring transaction integrity and automated access control.
•	Cloud Messaging: Architected a bulk email system using AWS SES and SNS, featuring a custom analytics dashboard to track open rates, bounces, and deliverability.
•	Enterprise Integrations: Developed cross-platform metadata services for seamless sharing on Meta, LinkedIn, and X, and integrated local news APIs for e-commerce platforms (ESamudaay).

•	Technical Project Leadership: Acted as the primary architect and decision-maker for the corporate portfolio platform, leading the end-to-end transition from conceptual design to a production-ready Next.js/React environment.
•	Performance Engineering: Optimized the frontend architecture to achieve a 90+ Google PageSpeed Insights score, ensuring superior Core Web Vitals, asset compression, and rapid load times.
•	Search Engine Strategy: Directed technical SEO and site discoverability by configuring and managing Google Search Console and Microsoft Bing Webmaster Tools for full indexation.
•	Cloud Infrastructure: Architected and managed the deployment pipeline using AWS Amplify and Amazon Route 53, ensuring 99.9% uptime and secure SSL/TLS content delivery.
•	Enterprise Solutions & Support: Engineered the organization’s communication backbone via AWS WorkMail; continue to provide high-level administration for SMTP integrations and scalable user access controls to date.
•	Creative Direction: Standardized digital brand assets using Adobe Creative Suite (Illustrator, Photoshop, Premiere Pro) to ensure UI/UX consistency across all web and media platforms.

name: Bhuvanesh Pranesh Acharya
professional_summary: Lead Software Engineer & Python Backend Specialist with over 2 years of experience in architecting scalable microservices, high-performance media pipelines, and enterprise automation engines. Proven track record of transforming legacy operations—highlighted by developing a Python/Flask sync engine that reduced manual labour by 160 hours per month and maintaining 99.9% uptime for critical B2B ecosystems. Expert in bridging the gap between complex enterprise infrastructures (Java/AWS) and modern, AI-integrated Python solutions.
profile_description: Specializing in Automation, AI Workflows, and Scalable Architectures

projects.description:
•	Developed a custom engine to sync real-time sales data via REST endpoints, eliminating 99% of manual entry errors and saving 160+ labour hours monthly
•	Tech Stack: Python, Flask, Noon Seller Lab API, Dafater ERP API, Ansible.
•	Problem: Manual entry of sales data from Noon.com to the Dafater ERP was causing significant human error and taking 40+ hours of labor weekly.
•	Action: Engineered a custom Python/Flask automation tool that polled Noon's marketplace APIs and mapped real-time sales data into the ERP's financial modules via secure REST endpoints to manage real-time sales data syncing.
•	Result: Eliminated 99% of data entry errors and saved the operations team ~160 hours per month, allowing for real-time inventory and financial reporting.

•	Tech Stack: Python, FFmpeg, RTMP, DASH, AWS S3.
•	Problem: Required a backend architecture capable of encoding and streaming high-definition regional cinema content to a global user base with adaptive bitrate support and high-resolution capabilities.
•	Action: Engineered a media processing engine in Python using FFmpeg to automate video transcoding into DASH formats. Optimized the pipeline to support native 4K resolution delivery, ensuring high-fidelity playback even on large-screen interfaces.
•	Result: Reduced video buffering by 35% across low-bandwidth regions and successfully architected a system capable of hosting 500+ regional titles; the 4K-ready infrastructure ensured future-proof scalability for high-end local content production.

•	Tech Stack: Python, OpenCV, Batch Processing, Image Optimization.
•	Problem: An internal archival process required the manual identification and cropping of faces across thousands of high-resolution images, creating a 100+ hour labor bottleneck.
•	Action: Developed a custom Python utility leveraging OpenCV to automate face detection and image normalization for bulk archival uploads.
•	Result: Achieved a 95% reduction in manual processing time, allowing the organization to process 5,000+ images per hour with a 98% accuracy rate in face detection.

•	Tech Stack: Python, OpenAI API, Flask, JSON Schema, REST APIs.
•	Problem: Researchers were spending an average of 6–8 hours manually synthesizing unstructured data into professional memos and formatted reports.
•	Action: Architected a Python/Flask microservice integrating OpenAI APIs with complex prompt-chaining logic to automate content summarization and report formatting.
•	Result: Slashed report generation time by 90% (from hours to minutes) and increased the content production capacity of the team by 4x.

•	Tech Stack: Python, AWS SES, AWS SNS, MySQL, Webhooks.
•	Problem: Required a reliable system to manage high-volume transactional emails while capturing real-time delivery data for business intelligence.
•	Action: Built a backend integration using Python and AWS SES/SNS with a custom webhook listener to track bounces, complaints, and open rates.
•	Result: Successfully managed an outbound volume of 50,000+ monthly emails with a 99.2% deliverability rate and provided 100% visibility into user engagement metrics.

technical_skills:
Programming Languages: Python (Advanced), Java, PHP, JavaScript (ES6+, jQuery), HTML5/CSS3, C, C++
Frameworks & Tools: Django, Django Rest Framework (DRF), FastAPI, Flask, Spring Boot, Docker, Git/GitLab, AWS (Amplify, SES, SNS), Ansible, Nginx
Databases & Caching: PostgreSQL, MySQL, Redis, HeidiSQL
Core Competencies: Full-Stack Web Development, Microservices Architecture, RESTful API Design & Integration, MENA Payment Gateways (Tabby, Tamara, Tap), AI/OpenAI Integration, ERP Automation
Soft Skills: Technical Project Leadership, Cross-Functional Collaboration, Analytical Problem Solving, Agile Methodologies
Additional Info: Typing: 50 WPM | Languages: English, Hindi, Kannada, Arabic (Basic & Learning)
Continuous Learning: Data Structures & Algorithms (DSA), Machine Learning (ML), Advanced AI
